name: Moist Cranberry/Apple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter or margarine and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add in the granulated sugar, egg, and milk. Beat until well combined.
3. Sift the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt into a bowl.
4. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the butter mixture until fully incorporated.
5. Mix in the grated orange rind, chopped apples, and cranberries.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes about 48 cookies.
